name: Quizlet Flashcard and Study Tools API
what_it_does: Quizlet flashcard and study tools REST API for EdTech developers and educational institutions to create and manage study sets, access user learning progress, and embed Quizlet's study modes — enabling automated flashcard creation, study set management, and learning analytics through Quizlet's platform used by 300M+ learners globally. Enables AI agents to manage study set creation for vocabulary learning automation, handle term addition for content population automation, access user progress for learning analytics automation, retrieve class enrollment for educational group management automation, manage folder organization for curriculum structure automation, handle study mode configuration for adaptive learning automation, access search for content discovery automation, retrieve learning statistics for performance reporting automation, manage assignment for classroom workflow automation, and integrate Quizlet with LMS, language, and tutoring platforms for spaced-repetition learning automation.
use_cases: Creating study sets and flashcard content programmatically for vocabulary learning automation agents
Accessing student study progress and performance metrics for learning analytics automation agents
Embedding Quizlet study modes into LMS for blended learning curriculum automation agents
Managing classroom study set assignments for educational workflow automation agents
not_for: Live interactive audience polling (Kahoot and Mentimeter are better for real-time engagement)
Complex adaptive learning with branching paths (Quizlet is flashcard-focused, not full LMS)
Secure proctored assessments (Quizlet is self-study, not secure test delivery)
best_when: An EdTech developer, language learning app, or educational institution wanting AI agents to create and manage Quizlet flashcard study sets, track learner progress, and integrate spaced-repetition study tools into learning workflows.
avoid_when: API ACCESS HAS BEEN RESTRICTED: Quizlet significantly restricted its public API in 2021, deprecating many endpoints; automated assumption of full API availability creates 404 or 403 errors on deprecated endpoints; automated should verify current API availability before committing to integration. RATE LIMITS ARE STRICT: Quizlet API has strict rate limits even for approved partners; automated unthrottled content creation creates rate_limit_exceeded; automated must implement aggressive request throttling. CONTENT LICENSING CONCERNS: Quizlet study sets include user-generated content; automated bulk download of study set content may violate Quizlet ToS and creator rights; automated content access must respect intellectual property guidelines. STUDY SETS ARE USER-OWNED: Study set access requires user authentication for private sets; automated access to all study sets without OAuth creates 403; automated must authenticate as user or use only public study set endpoints.

auth.notes: Quizlet uses OAuth 2.0 for user-authenticated API access; some endpoints support API key for public data. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2005 by Andrew Sutherland. Products: Flashcards, Learn mode, Match, Test, Gravity games, Quizlet Live. SDKs: None public. 300M+ learners. Note: API significantly restricted in 2021 — many legacy endpoints deprecated. GDPR, COPPA, FERPA compliant. Competes with Anki and Brainscape for spaced repetition.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier: limited public study set access; API access requires approved partner application
pricing.paid_tiers: Quizlet Plus $35.99/year (consumer); Quizlet for Schools institutional pricing; API via partner program
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. API restricted since 2021. Partner program for API. GDPR, COPPA, FERPA.

performance.rate_limits: Strict rate limits per API key/OAuth token; 100 requests/minute typical; no webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: API SIGNIFICANTLY RESTRICTED IN 2021: Quizlet deprecated many public API endpoints in 2021; automated assumption of historical API availability creates 404 Not Found on deprecated endpoints; automated must verify current endpoint availability before committing to integration

PARTNER PROGRAM REQUIRED: Full Quizlet API access requires approved partner application; automated self-service API key assumption creates limited or no access; automated must apply for Quizlet partner program for production integration

STRICT RATE LIMITS: Quizlet enforces strict per-token rate limits; automated bulk study set operations creates rate_limit_exceeded; automated must implement aggressive throttling with exponential backoff

USER AUTH REQUIRED FOR PRIVATE SETS: Accessing private or classroom study sets requires OAuth user authentication; automated API-key-only access to private content creates 403 Forbidden; automated must implement OAuth flow for user-specific content

CONTENT LICENSING: Quizlet user-generated study sets have creator IP rights; automated bulk download for redistribution violates ToS; automated content access must respect Quizlet's usage terms and creator attribution requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: EdTech flashcard platform. GDPR, COPPA, FERPA. OAuth2. US. Student and learner data including minors. API significantly restricted since 2021.

security_score_components.security_notes: EdTech flashcard platform. GDPR, COPPA, FERPA. OAuth2. US. Student and minor data. Deprecated endpoints risk.
